purpose: Supabase backend database schema for subscriber profiles, subscriptions, subscriber guidance cache, user submissions, feedback, palmistry requests, and Knowledge Vault monthly reviews.
guardrails: No public palm image upload without private storage and explicit consent.
No subscriber guidance without login, subscription, consent, and approved Knowledge Vault rules.
No anonymous backend intake until abuse prevention and storage policy are implemented.
Knowledge Vault monthly review remains scheduled for the 10th of every month.
next_batches: B20B Auth and subscription access model
